mapper.insert: INSERT INTO daily_valuations (user_id, stock_code, eval_date, quantity, close_price, eval_amount, profit_amount, profit_rate, currency) VALUES (#{userId}, #{stockCode}, #{evalDate}, #{quantity}, #{closePrice}, #{evalAmount}, #{profitAmount}, #{profitRate}, #{currency}) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE quantity = VALUES(quantity), close_price = VALUES(close_price), eval_amount = VALUES(eval_amount), profit_amount = VALUES(profit_amount), profit_rate = VALUES(profit_rate), currency = VALUES(currency)
